# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/issues/5011

# title: [Feature Request]: Support for new 2.0 models | 768x768 resolution + new 512x512 + depth + inpainting

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # ### Is there an existing issue for this?
    # - [X] I have searched the existing issues and checked the recent builds/commits
    # ### What would your feature do ?

if __name__ == '__main__':
